style_name: Clean Triptych Travel Vlog Thumbnail Style
style_summary: A clean travel-vlog thumbnail system built from three vertical photographic panels, oversized lowercase white destination type, small italic travel annotations, sparse hand-drawn marks, and a soft phone-camera editorial finish.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main traveler, host, couple, group, or implied travel point of view
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: walking, posing, holding a drink, looking across the street, boarding transit, or pausing at a landmark
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: unbranded drink, pastry, camera, tote bag, transit card, ticket, map, sunglasses, or travel snack
environment_variables.LOCATION: destination city, neighborhood, street route, cafe, station, park, landmark, waterfront, or theme-park-like attraction
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: three clean photo panels: close-up lifestyle panel, city-stroll panel, and landmark or scenic panel
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small vlog subtitle, day count, panel captions, and short handwritten-feeling notes
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: tiny hand-drawn heart, underline, sparkle, bracket, dash, or loose corner mark
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple travel outfit, dark coat, clean casual layers, neutral citywear, sunglasses, tote, or camera strap
environment_variables.ASPECT_RATIO: 9:16 vertical social thumbnail or 16:9 horizontal video thumbnail

prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Clean Triptych Travel Vlog Thumbnail" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main headline text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a clean three-panel travel-vlog thumbnail composition. Divide the frame into three equal vertical photographic panels with hard edges and no visible border. Make the left panel a close-up lifestyle or cafe moment, the center panel a city-stroll scene with the traveler, and the right panel a landmark, scenic viewpoint, skyline, garden, gate, harbor, or destination proof point.

Place a huge lowercase destination headline in pure white across the center of the whole image, crossing all three panels. Use an extra-bold rounded geometric sans-serif, smooth and friendly, with no outline and minimal shadow. Put small italic white panel labels near the top, a small day-count line above the headline, a parenthetical vlog subtitle below it, and one tiny bottom-corner diary note.

Add only sparse white hand-drawn accent marks: a tiny heart, dash, underline, corner stroke, sparkle, or loose bracket. Keep the photo treatment warm, candid, soft, lightly grainy, and phone-camera realistic. The mood should feel modern, clean, travel-diary-like, and ready for a video thumbnail.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, readable real brand logo, brand name, celebrity likeness, cluttered sticker collage, scrapbook overload, neon poster, grunge texture, luxury travel ad, corporate brochure, colorful headline, heavy drop shadow, outlined text, illegible destination text, plain single-photo background, and dark muddy image.
negative_prompt: Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, readable real brand logo, brand name, celebrity likeness, cluttered sticker collage, scrapbook overload, neon poster, grunge texture, luxury travel ad, corporate brochure, colorful headline, heavy drop shadow, outlined text, illegible destination text, plain single-photo background, and dark muddy image.

values.SUBJECT: a solo traveler in a black coat and sunglasses
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: walking through a bright city street while glancing sideways
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: unbranded iced citrus drink held close to the camera
values.LOCATION: Seoul cafe district and palace garden route
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: close-up cafe drink, glassy city avenue, palace roofline, garden wall, blue sky, and warm evening sidewalk
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: 3 days in / korea vlog / are we staying out late
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small white hand-drawn heart and short dash marks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: black city coat, relaxed trousers, sunglasses, tote bag, and clean walking shoes
